title: EXD - Extra Dimensional Review: A Dark & Disturbing VR Adventure
description: Though EXD - Extra Dimensional is a truly stunning showcase for VR graphics, and an amazing auditory experience in dread and fear, it's also a game that doesn't quite reach its full potential.

title: Legendary Tales Planning A Sandbox Mode & Friendly Fire Feature Later This Year
description: After the release of its recent DLC, VR ARPG Legendary Tales has laid out its future roadmap, including a sandbox mode and friendly fire feature expected later this year.

title: Walkabout Mini Golf Announces New Blokhaven DLC Coming On May 7
description: Walkabout Mini Golf announced a new DLC course called 'Blokhaven', set to launch May 7 on all of its supported VR platforms.

title: Space Explorers: The Infinite Is The Closest I’ve Felt To Life In Orbit
description: While virtually exploring the International Space Station in Space Explorers: THE INFINITE, we discovered the closest feeling to actually living in orbit.

title: Paranormal Activity: The Lost Soul Will Be Delisted 'Soon' Due To License Expiration
description: Paranormal Activity: The Lost Soul will be removed from all VR & flatscreen platforms soon due to its license from Paramount expiring.

title: Pluto TV’s Immersive Quest App Gets The Atmosphere Right, But Leaves Questions
description: Pluto TV introduced a new immersive viewing app on Quest. Here's what it offers, what works, and where it comes up short.

title: Kamitsubaki City Review: So Close To Being One Of VR’s Best Narrative Adventures
description: It’s surprisingly difficult to recommend one of the best narrative VR experiences, Kamitsubaki City.

title: The UploadVR Showcase is coming June 12 - Applications Open Now!
description: The UploadVR Showcase will premiere June 12.

title: Into The Radius 2 Exits Early Access On PC & Looks To The Future
description: Into The Radius 2's PC VR full release is available now - and CM Immersive is already planning its future updates.

title: Free DIRECTV Streaming App Now Live On Quest
description: A free DIRECTV streaming app is now available on Quest headsets.

title: VR FPS Contractors Showdown: Exfil Zone Launches PvE Mode In Latest Wipe Update
description: The fourth wipe update for VR extraction shooter Contractors: Showdown ExFilZone is now live.

title: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes Review - A Faithfully Terrifying Adaptation
description: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes is an excellent translation of the series to VR, lacking only in more robust VR comfort options.

title: Forefront's New Map Makes It Feel More Like Battlefield VR Than Ever
description: Large-scale VR shooter Forefront launches in full tomorrow. We tried out the new Clearwater map, which makes it feel more like Battlefield VR than ever.

title: 4 Lesser-Known VR Fitness Apps That Don't Require A Subscription
description: Looking for a VR workout without a monthly fee? Hitstream, X-Fitness, Boxing Fitness, and Punch Fit are solid apps for when you just want to hit something.

title: Multiplayer Games You Can Play In VR With Friends Who Don't Own A Headset
description: Sadly, most of our friends and family don't own a VR headset. Thankfully, there are many crossplay hybrid games you can enjoy with them.

title: Marrow Marrow Hands-On: We Shoot & Scoot In This Great Roguelike Shooter
description: Marrow Marrow is a frantic VR movement shooter that succeeds because of its confident presentation, sharp audio design, and kinetic gameplay.

title: Five Nights At Freddy's: Secret Of The Mimic Adds VR Support Next Week
description: Five Nights At Freddy's: Secret of the Mimic adds VR support for PS VR2 next week with no news on other platforms.

title: Sock Puppet Superstar Is The Silliest VR Game I've Ever Seen
description: Sock Puppet Superstars is the silliest (and funniest) VR game I've ever seen.

title: Quest Update Fixes The Biggest Problem With Screenshots & Recording
description: New Quest PTC upgrades screenshots with capture markers to show what you get before you snap the shot.

title: DIRECTV Lists Live TV Streaming App For Meta Quest Ahead Of Spring 2026 Launch
description: DIRECTV appears to be preparing a native app for Meta Quest, based on a newly discovered listing on the Quest store pointing to a planned Spring 2026 release.

title: 4v1 VR Sci-Fi Horror Game BlackGate Adds New Unlockable Alien
description: Dead By Daylight-inspired asymmetric VR sci-fi horror game BlackGate adds a new playable alien character, the Titan.

title: Can Apple Immersive Video Convey The Spirit of New York?
description: We were excited for the New York City episode of Apple Vision Pro's Elevated series, but its overstimulated creative choices leave limited room to connect with the city's spirit.

title: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR Delayed To May
description: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR has been delayed two weeks, per Flat2VR Studios.

title: Indie MR/VR Puzzle Game Squingle Arcade Opens First Public Playtest
description: The makers of Squingle Arcade are inviting players to go hands-on with their upcoming free-to-play MR/VR spatial puzzle game from April 16 through April 26.

title: Synth Riders Dua Lipa Music Pack Available Now
description: Synth Riders added Dua Lipa to its collection of officially licensed maps with seven new tracks.

title: Just One Man Impressions: Stylish & Intense Sword Action
description: Just One Man is an immersive VR hack-and-slash that puts you in the armor of a lone samurai warrior cutting his way through an endless army of enemies.

title: Psychological Horror Game Evil Inside Comes To VR In May
description: The psychological horror game Evil Inside is coming to Quest 3 headsets and PlayStation VR2 in May.

title: Meta Is Increasing The Price Of Quest 3 & Quest 3S
description: Meta is increasing the price of Quest 3 to $600 and Quest 3S to $350, citing the global memory chip crisis that has seen other tech prices rise.

title: Microsoft Flight Simulator PS VR2 Support Beta Out Now With  Full Release 'Targeted' For Next Week (Updated)
description: PS VR2 support for Microsoft Flight Simulator is expected to release next week, according to the MSFS dev team.

title: Researchers Induce Smells With Ultrasound, No Chemical Cartridges Required
description: A group of independent researchers built a device that can artificially induce smell using ultrasound, with no consumable cartridges required.

title: Payday: Aces High Developer Reveals Key Details & Answers PS VR2 Port Requests
description: We got new Payday: Aces High details in a Reddit AMA with Fast Travel Games, including an answer on the potential for a PlayStation VR2 port.

title: How To Customize Your Quest 3S Action Button
description: New shortcuts for Meta AI, screen capture, and mic mute.

title: Space Control Review: Working In Space Sucks More Than A Job In Real Life
description: Space Control is a lackluster off-the-wall VR space comedy with a splash of job simulation that struggles to get the job done.

title: The Amusement Review: A Poignant Story Wrapped In Thin Roomscale Puzzles
description: The Amusement is a near-perfect blend of proper VR storytelling and environmental puzzles, though it's short on variety.

title: Lucent VR Is The Prettiest Quest 3 Experience I've Ever Played
description: Lucent VR, a recently-released exploration experience, is one of the most technically stunning and artfully inspired destinations on Quest 3.

title: Deep Sea Puzzler Echoes Of Mora Delayed To Q3 2026
description: Echoes of Mora, a story-based underwater puzzle game, has been delayed to later this year.

title: Google's XR Gemini Extension Lets You "Vibe Code" WebXR Experiences In Seconds
description: Google's "Vibe Coding XR" Gemini workflow lets you rapidly build interactive mixed reality WebXR experiences by simply describing what you want with text.

title: Exoshock - Hands On With The Founders Edition
description: Exoshock is a visceral, first person shooter that can now be accessed via the Founders Edition before it launches in Early Access.

title: Green Hell 2026 Roadmap Promises Major PC VR Update
description: Green Hell VR players on PC will finally get co-op later this year, but it may come with a trade-off.

title: Do Meta Glasses Make You A "Glasshole"?
description: Privacy matters, but glasses aren't the only camera tech.

title: TaVRn's Takedown - Naheulbeuk Review: Punching Orcs Has Never Felt So Good
description: We punch our way through TaVRn's Takedown, a chaotic, physics-based VR brawler set in a slapstick fantasy universe.

title: COVR Is A Tactical VR Milsim From The Zero Caliber Developer
description: The developer of the Zero Caliber series announced tactical VR milsim COVR, its second planned 2026 release.

title: Plasmaborne Impressions: The Devil Is In The Details
description: Plasmaborne is an ambitious Doom-inspired roguelite with a few rough edges to smooth over.

title: Jigsaw Night & VR Villa Partner To Introduce Hundreds Of People To VR
description: We traveled to the USA Jigsaw Nationals in Atlanta to see two VR enthusiasts introduce VR to hundreds of new people.

title: Darts VR2: Bullseye Impressions: Of Course There Are Zombies
description: Darts VR2: Bullseye, out now in Early Access, keeps it simple, making it easy to repeatedly return for one more round.

title: As Horizon Worlds Moves Away From VR, Its Users Decide Their Future
description: As Meta drops VR support for new Horizon Worlds, we take a look at the people who run virtual venues on the platform and what they intend to do after the pivot.

title: Wrath: Aeon of Ruin VR - Brutal Edition Review: Valiant Effort
description: Wrath: Aeon of Ruin VR - Brutal Edition is a valiant effort to translate an old-school genre into VR, but its design pulls it back from greatness.

title: Skytail Impressions: A Wave Shooter By Any Other Name Is Still A Wave Shooter
description: Skytail is a mellow aerial adventure trying to bring something new to one of VR's oldest staples.

title: Project Hail Mary: Journey Among The Stars Launching Later This Year
description: The Project Hail Mary tie-in game is coming to major mixed reality and VR platforms in late 2026.

title: No Man's Sky Channels Pokémon in Latest Update
description: No Man's Sky's latest update adds Pokémon-style companion battles in new Xeno arenas.

title: Tammuz: Blood And Sand Is A Rubik's Cube On Steroids
description: Tammuz: Blood & Sand is a box puzzler that tests your logic and reasoning out now on Quest and Steam.

title: Star Trek: Infection Review: Survival Horror At The Final Frontier
description: Star Trek: Infection on Meta Quest 3 and PC VR takes the horror that has always lurked on the fringes of Trek and centers it in a way that feels especially potent in virtual reality.

title: Synth Riders Developer Confirms "Major Layoffs" In December And January
description: Synth Riders developer Kluge Interactive confirmed it has been through multiple rounds of layoffs since December.

title: Riddlewood Manor Early Access Out Now On Quest
description: Riddlewood Manor, a spooky point-and-click VR adventure from the makers of Retropolis, is out now in Early Access on Quest.

title: Beat Saber Once Again The Most Downloaded PlayStation VR2 Game In March
description: Beat Saber was once again the most downloaded PlayStation VR2 game in March, despite stopping updates and ending multiplayer.

title: Meta Glasses Getting Nutrition Tracking, WhatsApp Summaries, Display Recording & More
description: Meta announced a swathe of features coming to its smart glasses, including nutrition tracking, WhatsApp summaries, display recording, more translation languages, and expanded navigation.

title: Golf+ Expands Its Catalog of Original Courses with New Dynasty Course
description: Dynasty, a new original course for Golf+, is available now.

title: Skyworld: Kingdom Brawl To Shut Down In July
description: VR RTS arena card battler Skyworld: Kingdom Brawl will be shut down this summer.

title: The 7th Guest VR Owners Will Get The Flat Screen Remake For Free
description: Players who own The 7th Guest VR on Steam or PlayStation VR2 will get the upcoming flat screen Remake for free at launch.

title: Quest's Horizon+ Games Catalog Gets Two Major New VR Games
description: April's additions to the Meta Horizon+ games catalog are Breachers, Vacation Simulator and Prison Boss Prohibition.

title: Zero Caliber: Frostbite Is A Far Cry Inspired VR Shooter
description: The developer of Zero Caliber and Gambit confirms it is working on two new VR titles, including a Far Cry inspired shooter.

title: Le Dino Labo DLC Jurassic Giants Out Today
description: Le Dino Labo, a mixed-reality dinosaur building experience, gets its first expansion today with Jurassic Giants DLC.

title: Cinematic VR FPS Action Hero Gets A New, Lower Price
description: Blockbuster VR FPS Action Hero got a permanent price cut.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City Has A Release Date & We Went Hands-On Again
description: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City now has a release date, and we played the game once again at GDC in a private session.
